_comment: Manifest used by setup.py to download and install community plugins. Not read by Obsidian.
_comment2: Obsidian enables plugins listed in community-plugins.json; this file tells the installer WHERE to fetch each one.

plugins.description: Auto-commit, pull, push. The hands-off git layer.
Live queries over vault frontmatter. Powers the MOCs.
Powerful templates with JS expressions. Replaces core Templates.
Folder + file icons. Visual wayfinding across 15+ projects.
Better full-text search. Native search struggles at scale.
Daily/weekly/monthly notes with templating. Powers /today scheduling.
